message:
feat(policy): integrate BundleRegistry into PolicyEngine + fix test compilation

- Add BundleRegistry as 17th subsystem of PolicyEngine with register/remove/query
- Add bundle_registry field to SafetyConfig with BundleRegistryConfig
- Add with_connector() builder method to ConnectorBundle
- Fix BundleCategory::Observability → Monitoring (variant doesn't exist)
- Fix compliance_engine() → compliance_engine_mut() for snapshot() calls
- 6 integration tests: audit chain recording, compliance feed, metrics dashboard,
  config initialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
